Function to create a LauncherAppGlance object from an AppMenuNode.

# Purpose
This header file declares a function `launcher_app_glance_settings_create`, which is intended to create and return a pointer to a `LauncherAppGlance` object. The function takes a constant pointer to an `AppMenuNode` as its parameter, suggesting that it uses this node to configure or initialize the `LauncherAppGlance` object. The file includes two other headers: `launcher_app_glance.h` and `process_management/app_menu_data_source.h`, indicating dependencies on these components for the definition of `LauncherAppGlance` and `AppMenuNode`. The use of `#pragma once` ensures that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on the creation of a specific type of object related to application menu management.
# Imports and Dependencies
